trans-unit.note: Table PW Batch - Property Caption
Table PW Batch - Field Company Name - Property Caption
Table PW Batch - Field Completed At - Property Caption
Table PW Batch - Field Completed Chunks - Property Caption
Table PW Batch - Field Created At - Property Caption
Table PW Batch - Field Failed Chunks - Property Caption
Table PW Batch - Field Id - Property Caption
Table PW Batch - Field Status - Property Caption
Table PW Batch - Field Timeout Seconds - Property Caption
Table PW Batch - Field Total Chunks - Property Caption
Table PW Batch - Field Worker Type - Property Caption
Table PW Batch Chunk - Property Caption
Table PW Batch Chunk - Field Batch Id - Property Caption
Table PW Batch Chunk - Field Chunk Index - Property Caption
Table PW Batch Chunk - Field Completed At - Property Caption
Table PW Batch Chunk - Field Error Call Stack - Property Caption
Table PW Batch Chunk - Field Error Message - Property Caption
Table PW Batch Chunk - Field Full Error Message - Property Caption
Table PW Batch Chunk - Field Input Payload - Property Caption
Table PW Batch Chunk - Field Result Payload - Property Caption
Table PW Batch Chunk - Field Session Id - Property Caption
Table PW Batch Chunk - Field Started At - Property Caption
Table PW Batch Chunk - Field Status - Property Caption
Codeunit PW Batch Coordinator - NamedType SessionTerminatedErr

trans-unit.source: Cannot start a parallel batch while a write transaction is active. Commit or rollback your changes before calling RunFor* methods, otherwise they would be silently committed.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit PW Batch Coordinator - NamedType WriteTransactionErr

trans-unit.source: Key "%1" not found in chunk input.
trans-unit.note: %1 = JSON key name
Codeunit PW Chunk Context - NamedType KeyNotFoundErr

trans-unit.source: Chunk context has not been initialized.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit PW Chunk Context - NamedType NotInitializedErr

trans-unit.source: This chunk was not created via RunForRecords.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit PW Chunk Context - NamedType NotRecordChunkErr
%1 = chunk index
Codeunit PW Sample Runner - NamedType ChunkPrefixLbl
%1 = total record count, %2 = chunk count
Codeunit PW Sample Runner - NamedType CompletedRecordsLbl
%1 = number of tables
Codeunit PW Sample Runner - NamedType CompletedTablesLbl
%1 = number of items
Codeunit PW Sample Runner - NamedType ItemsProcessedLbl
%1 = batch status, %2 = completed chunks, %3 = total chunks
Codeunit PW Sample Runner - NamedType ProgressLbl
%1 = number of records
Codeunit PW Sample Runner - NamedType RecordCountLbl
%1 = table number
Codeunit PW Sample Runner - NamedType TableNoRecordsLbl
%1 = record count
Codeunit PW Sample Runner - NamedType TableRecordCountLbl
%1 = total record count
Codeunit PW Sample Runner - NamedType TotalCountedLbl
Page PW Batch Chunk List - Property Caption
Page PW Batch Chunk List - Control Batch Id - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Index of this chunk within the batch.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Batch Chunk List - Control Chunk Index - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batch Chunk List - Control Completed At - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Error message if the chunk failed.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Batch Chunk List - Control Error Message - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Background session ID that executed this chunk.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Batch Chunk List - Control Session Id - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batch Chunk List - Control Started At - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batch Chunk List - Control Status - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Show the full error call stack for this chunk.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Batch Chunk List - Action ViewErrorCallStack - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batch Chunk List - Action ViewErrorCallStack - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Show the full error message for this chunk (not truncated).
trans-unit.note: Page PW Batch Chunk List - Action ViewFullError - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batch Chunk List - Action ViewFullError - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Show the JSON input payload for this chunk.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Batch Chunk List - Action ViewInputPayload - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batch Chunk List - Action ViewInputPayload - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Show the JSON result payload for this chunk.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Batch Chunk List - Action ViewResultPayload - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batch Chunk List - Action ViewResultPayload - Property Caption
Page PW Batches - Property Caption
Page PW Batches - Control Completed At - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Number of chunks that completed successfully.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Batches - Control Completed Chunks - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batches - Control Created At - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batches - Control Failed Chunks - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batches - Control Id - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batches - Control Status - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Total number of chunks in this batch.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Batches - Control Total Chunks - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: The worker implementation used for this batch.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Batches - Control Worker Type - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Delete all finished batches completed more than 24 hours ago.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Batches - Action CleanupOlderThan24h - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batches - Action CleanupOlderThan24h - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Delete this batch and all its chunk records.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Batches - Action CleanupSelected - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batches - Action CleanupSelected - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View all chunks for this batch.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Batches - Action ViewChunks - Property ToolTip
Page PW Batches - Action ViewChunks - Property Caption
Page PW Demo - Property Caption
Page PW Demo - Control Details - Property Caption
Page PW Demo - Control ChunkDetails - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Control ChunkDetails - Property Caption
Page PW Demo - Control Input - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Max runtime per session. Platform kills the session if exceeded. 0 = no limit.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Demo - Control SessionTimeoutMs - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Control SessionTimeoutMs - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Table to count records from. Used by Run Record Count.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Demo - Control TableNo - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Control TableNo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Comma-separated table numbers. Used by Run Multi-Table Count.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Demo - Control TableNosText - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Control TableNosText - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Number of work items. Used by Run Simulation and Non-Blocking demos.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Demo - Control TaskCount - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Control TaskCount - Property Caption
Page PW Demo - Control ThreadCount - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Control ThreadCount - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Simulated work time per item in milliseconds.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Demo - Control WorkDurationMs - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Control WorkDurationMs - Property Caption
Page PW Demo - Control Output - Property Caption
Page PW Demo - Control BatchIdText - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Control BatchIdText - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: How long the parallel execution actually took.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Demo - Control ElapsedMs - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Control ElapsedMs - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: How long this would take in a single thread.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Demo - Control ExpectedSequentialMs - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Control ExpectedSequentialMs - Property Caption
Page PW Demo - Control ProgressText - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Control ProgressText - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Expected sequential time divided by actual parallel time.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Demo - Control Speedup - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Control Speedup - Property Caption
Page PW Demo - Control StatusText - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Control StatusText - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Collect results (if finished) and delete batch records.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Demo - Action CollectAndCleanup - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Action CollectAndCleanup - Property Caption
Page PW Demo - Action RefreshProgress - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Action RefreshProgress - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: RunForChunks pattern: one chunk per table, count each in parallel.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Demo - Action RunMultiTable - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Action RunMultiTable - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: RunForRecords pattern: split table records, count per chunk.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Demo - Action RunRecordCount - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Action RunRecordCount - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: RunForList pattern: split items, simulate work, measure speedup.
trans-unit.note: Page PW Demo - Action RunSimulation - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Action RunSimulation - Property Caption
Page PW Demo - Action StartNonBlocking - Property ToolTip
Page PW Demo - Action StartNonBlocking - Property Caption
Page PW Demo - Action BlockingDemos - Property Caption
Page PW Demo - Action NonBlockingDemos - Property Caption
Enum PW Batch Status - EnumValue Completed - Property Caption
Enum PW Batch Status - EnumValue Failed - Property Caption
Enum PW Batch Status - EnumValue PartialFailure - Property Caption
Enum PW Batch Status - EnumValue Pending - Property Caption
Enum PW Batch Status - EnumValue Running - Property Caption
Enum PW Chunk Status - EnumValue Completed - Property Caption
Enum PW Chunk Status - EnumValue Failed - Property Caption
Enum PW Chunk Status - EnumValue Pending - Property Caption
Enum PW Chunk Status - EnumValue Running - Property Caption
EnumExtension PW Sample Worker Type - EnumValue RecordCounter - Property Caption
EnumExtension PW Sample Worker Type - EnumValue Sample - Property Caption
EnumExtension PW Sample Worker Type - EnumValue TableCounter - Property Caption
